summary: Quantitative data on Governance trends over time from World Bank WGI shows specific percentile rankings and scores. For example, Denmark scored 2.14 (98th percentile) on Rule of Law in 2022, while Somalia scored -2.31 (2nd percentile).
key_points: Specific WGI scores with years and percentiles
Country examples across the governance spectrum
sources: Kaufmann, Kraay, Mastruzzi (2010) WGI Methodology Paper
Freedom House Freedom in the World
philosophy_guard: PASS - Describes what IS: measurable governance indicators and empirical patterns. No normative claims about what OUGHT to be.
